title: Coming soon: what's next
description: A scheduled preview of upcoming work.
excerpt: This post is a draft scheduled to publish automatically — it won't appear on the site until its time comes.
author: Pagewright

props.html: This is a scheduled draft. Because draft is true and publishAt is in the future, it is excluded from the build. The scheduled-publish.yml workflow promotes it to published once its time arrives, then commits the change — which triggers a fresh deploy.
